query: Detect all planes and storage tanks, and plot the distribution?

input.command:
# import packages
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
def solution():
    categories = ['airplane', 'storage tank']
    data = [13, 10]
    figure = plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
    plt.bar(categories, data, color=['skyblue', 'orange'])
    plt.xlabel('Category')
    plt.ylabel('Count')
    plt.title('Distribution of Airplanes and Storage Tanks')
    return figure
